only took it 5 days costing ~$35K of mythos api time (the same exploit class costs $5-10M on grey market)

the researchers that commandeered the https://t.co/enuhvF6rTH

priority.full_text:
New blackboard lecture w @ericjang11

He walks through how to build AlphaGo from scratch, but with modern AI tools.

Sometimes you understand the future better by stepping backward. AlphaGo is still the cleanest worked example of the primitives of intelligence: search, learning https://t.co/DHlVMOOt2z
priority.summary: Eric Zhang讲座：用现代AI工具从零构建AlphaGo。通过重新审视AlphaGo的搜索、学习等智能基础原理，理解AI未来发展方向。
viral_signals: 有人物/团队故事：@ericjang11知名AI研究者
反常识/意外性：向后看AlphaGo来理解未来
angles: AlphaGo复现指南：用现代工具重建棋类AI
为什么顶级AI研究者都在重学AlphaGo
从AlphaGo看AI智能的三个本质：搜索、学习、决策
